'''kathara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iguanodontid|iguanodontid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iguanodontid|iguanodontid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kathara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæthæræth|kæthæræth]] || [[word:kæthæræj|kæthæræj]] || [[word:kæthæræsh|kæthæræsh]] || [[word:kæthæræ|kæthæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kathatharath|kathatharath]] || [[word:kathatharaj|kathatharaj]] || [[word:kathatharash|kathatharash]] || [[word:kathathara|kathathara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:katharath|katharath]] || [[word:katharaj|katharaj]] || [[word:katharash|katharash]] || [[word:kathara|kathara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kathafrath|kathafrath]] || [[word:kathafraj|kathafraj]] || [[word:kathafrash|kathafrash]] || [[word:kathafraf|kathafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:katharatha|katharatha]] || [[word:katharaja|katharaja]] || [[word:katharasha|katharasha]] || [[word:katharaka|katharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:katharath|katharath]] || [[word:katharaj|katharaj]] || [[word:katharash|katharash]] || [[word:kathara|kathara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:katharathal|katharathal]] || [[word:katharajal|katharajal]] || [[word:katharashal|katharashal]] || [[word:katharakal|katharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:katharathatha|katharathatha]] || [[word:katharajaja|katharajaja]] || [[word:katharashasha|katharashasha]] || [[word:katharaka|katharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:katharathan|katharathan]] || [[word:katharajan|katharajan]] || [[word:katharashan|katharashan]] || [[word:katharakan|katharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:katharathaoro|katharathaoro]] || [[word:katharajaoro|katharajaoro]] || [[word:katharashaoro|katharashaoro]] || [[word:katharakaoro|katharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
